channel.title: X Feed Transfer Generated Posts
channel.description: Generated X-ready posts produced from source articles

item.title: Phishers copy Alipay HK to steal data—alert and act now. 🚨 Don’t click, verify, and report any suspect messages to Alipay HK or 18222. https://Blockchain.News/news/hkma-phishing-alert-alipay-hk #CyberSecurity #Phishing #HKMA
item.description: Phishers copy Alipay HK to steal data—alert and act now. 🚨 Don’t click, verify, and report any suspect messages to Alipay HK or 18222. https://Blockchain.News/news/hkma-phishing-alert-alipay-hk #CyberSecurity #Phishing #HKMA

item.title: AAVE teeters at the final floor: $85–$87 could pin the drop, even as smart money sits long at 59%. Is a 20% snapback coming or deeper capitulation? 🔥 https://Blockchain.News/news/20260423-prediction-aave-breakdown-targets-85-support-before-dead #crypto #AAVE #trading

item.title: LDO breaks below $0.36: momentum dies, open interest spikes, path to $0.30 soon. 🚨 https://Blockchain.News/news/20260423-target-prediction-ldo-breakdown-imminent-030-as-bulls-abandon #crypto #LDO #trading
